nameMeanings.name: Shelley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Shelley (Essex, Suffolk, Yorkshire) or from Shelley Plain in Crawley (Sussex). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Laois): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sealbhaigh ‘descendant of Sealbhach’, a byname from the adjective sealbhach ‘having possessions, wealthy’.

variants.name: Shallow
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny and Wexford): variant of   Shelley  .
English: nickname from Middle English shalou(e) ‘shallow’, conjectured also to mean ‘thin’; perhaps also the same word in the topographic sense of ‘shallow place in a stretch of water’.

variants.name: Shelly
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shelley  .

variants.name: Sheley
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Shelley  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John Shelley was born in 1494, in Sussex, England, his father, Richard Shelley, was 15 and his mother, Mary Urdiswicke, was 22. He had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Ann Agmondsham. He died in 1571, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Shelley est né en 1494, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Shelley, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mary Urdiswicke, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Ann Agmondsham. Il est décédé en 1571, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Shelley 1494 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Shelley 15 und seine Mutter Mary Urdiswicke 22. Er hatte mit Ann Agmondsham mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1571 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Shelley è nato il nel 1494 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Richard Shelley, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Mary Urdiswicke, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Ann Agmondsham. Morì nel 1571, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Shelley(이)가 1494년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Shelley(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Urdiswicke(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Ann Agmondsham(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Shelley родился в 1494 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Shelley было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Urdiswicke, 22. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Ann Agmondsham. Он умер в 1571 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Shelley nació en 1494, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Shelley, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mary Urdiswicke, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Ann Agmondsham. Murió en 1571, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
